creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
This update was reverted in r437156, with the comment "Revert r437110,  this upgrade breaks lots of ports depending on it".

Apologies for not clarifying that I had not tested the ports which depend on this port.

When I get some time, I will try and find what breaks, and how to fix it. Would be glad for any help on this also.
